features: Add AP028, AP029, AP030 anti-pattern detectors
bugFixes: Fix `DataSyncHandler` duplicate registration — `ExplorerService` now deduplicates handlers via `Set`; `CommandService` deduplicates via `Map<constructor.name, instance>` and emits a `warn` log for each removed duplicate

Fix `publishSync` — versioned `sk` is now assigned to `command.sk` before handler dispatch so `IDataSyncHandler.up()` receives the correct key; `updateStatus` errors are no longer silently masked; `pk`/`sk` are now included in `checkNextToken` warn logs
security: Harden npm dependencies — resolve high/moderate vulnerabilities via `overrides` (`lodash`, `tmp`, `multer`, `ajv`, `picomatch`, `fast-xml-parser`) and targeted upgrades (`@nestjs/config` ^4.0.4, `@typescript-eslint` v8); root production audit: 0 critical/high
Add blocking CI gates: `npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high` and ESLint startup check run on every PR, failing the build on any production vulnerability

features: Add AP028, AP029, AP030 anti-pattern detectors
bugFixes: Fix `DataSyncHandler` duplicate registration — `ExplorerService` now deduplicates handlers via `Set`; `CommandService` deduplicates via `Map<constructor.name, instance>` and emits a `warn` log for each removed duplicate

Fix `publishSync` — versioned `sk` is now assigned to `command.sk` before handler dispatch so `IDataSyncHandler.up()` receives the correct key; `updateStatus` errors are no longer silently masked; `pk`/`sk` are now included in `checkNextToken` warn logs
security: Harden npm dependencies — resolve high/moderate vulnerabilities via `overrides` (`lodash`, `tmp`, `multer`, `ajv`, `picomatch`, `fast-xml-parser`) and targeted upgrades (`@nestjs/config` ^4.0.4, `@typescript-eslint` v8); root production audit: 0 critical/high
Add blocking CI gates: `npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high` and ESLint startup check run on every PR, failing the build on any production vulnerability

features: Add group-based role authorization — `RolesGuard` checks direct roles from `custom:roles` first, then roles derived from the user's groups in the new `custom:groups` claim
Update skills and analyzer for v1.3.1
bugFixes: Tolerate a malformed `custom:groups` claim (fail-closed to no group roles) instead of throwing, so a bad token degrades to direct-role-only checks rather than crashing the request

features: Add `AppSyncEventsService` — opt-in HTTP pub/sub transport for real-time notifications via AWS AppSync Events API

CDK infra template: add `appsyncEvents` and `notificationTransports` to `Config` type — provisions `EventApi` + `ChannelNamespace`, injects `NOTIFICATION_TRANSPORTS`, `APPSYNC_EVENTS_ENDPOINT`, and `APPSYNC_EVENTS_NAMESPACE` into Lambda and ECS, and grants `appsync:EventPublish` IAM permission via `grantPublish()` automatically
Update skills and analyzer for v1.3.0
Repository Read-Your-Writes (RYW) improvements — proactively purge stale RYW sessions when the data table catches up to or surpasses the session version, eliminating "stale override" reads
Add AP021 anti-pattern detector — `Event Emit Directly After publishAsync in CommandService` (Severity: High)

Add cross-reference table mapping detector AP codes (`analyze.ts`) to skill-doc AP codes (`skills/mbc-review/SKILL.md`) — the two systems use independent numbering and only AP016–AP019 and AP021 share codes
bugFixes: `server.ts` was hardcoding the package version, which silently drifted on every `lerna version` bump. Now read at runtime from `package.json`
